info.name: Doctor Clinic API
info.description:
Doctor Clinic API – All Endpoints

## Token Auto-Storage

All Login/Register responses include a **Tests** script that automatically stores `access_token`, `refresh_token`, and `expires_in` as collection variables. No manual copy-paste needed.

## Authenticated Requests

The **Auth**, **Locations** (management), and **Images** folders have a **Pre-request Script** that attaches `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}` to every request automatically.

item.name: Auth
item.description:
All authentication operations.

**Pre-request Script** attaches the Bearer token automatically for protected routes.

item.name: Locations
item.description:
Countries and Cities CRUD.

Public routes: List / Get.
Protected routes (auth required): Create, Update, Delete.

item.name: Images
item.description:
Image upload, serve & delete.

All endpoints require authentication (Bearer token). Images are stored privately and served through the API (not publicly accessible).

Upload accepts `multipart/form-data`:
- `file`: image file (jpg, jpeg, png, webp)
- `type`: enum (`user`, `country`)
- `imageable_id`: UUID of the target object

item.name: Doctors
item.description:
Doctor management.

Public routes: List / Get.
Protected routes (auth required + admin): Update, Delete, Activate Account.

item.name: Appointments
item.description:
Full appointment lifecycle: request, set time, respond, cancel, complete, suggest alternative.

All endpoints require authentication (Bearer token). Booked slots is public.

item.name: Supervisions
item.description:
Doctor-Patient assignment management.

All endpoints require authentication. Assign/Remove require staff role (admin or receptionist).

item.name: Receptionists
item.description:
Receptionist management.

Protected routes (auth + admin): Activate account.

item.name: Patients
item.description:
Patient management.

Protected routes (auth + staff): List / Get.
Protected routes (auth + admin): Update, Delete.

item.name: Notifications
item.description:
Notification management for authenticated users.

Every request in this folder automatically attaches `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}` via the Pre-request Script.
